entities.name: PRD
entities.context: Product Requirements Document used for planning, has 7 sections

entities.name: PRD Completeness
entities.context: Evaluation dimension weighted at 20%, measures planning thoroughness

entities.name: Documentation Strategy
entities.context: Evaluation dimension weighted at 15%, measures documentation planning

entities.name: Self-healing
entities.context: Mechanism for automatic recovery, required in PRD

entities.name: Sync mechanisms
entities.context: Strategy for data/state synchronization in system design

entities.name: Single source of truth
entities.context: Documentation principle where one authoritative location holds information

entities.name: Principles
entities.context: Guiding beliefs that should inform rationale and decisions

relationships.context: PRD Completeness dimension evaluates PRD document quality
Self-healing mechanisms are a component of complete PRD
Sync strategy clarity is part of PRD completeness
Rollback plan existence is part of PRD completeness
SSOT is key component of documentation strategy
Rationale should connect to principles and acknowledge trade-offs
